results.title: AutoDex: An Automated Real-World System for Dexterous Grasping Data Collection
results.summary: Learning robust dexterous grasping requires real-world data that records the physical outcomes of grasp attempts. results.title: Semantic Browsing: Controllable Diversity for Image Generation
results.summary: Modern text-to-image models excel in visual fidelity and prompt adherence. results.title: PsyBridge: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Multi-Dimensional Mental Health Assessment and Decision Support

results.title: Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles
results.summary: This paper presents our algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, focusing on Bit Manipulation Puzzles. results.title: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild

results.title: Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning
results.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. results.title: LIBERO-Safety: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Physical and Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models
results.summary: Despite the impressive manipulation capabilities of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, their operational safety under strict constraints remains largely unverified. results.title: Emergent Andreev Reflection from a Lattice Duality Defect
results.summary: Andreev reflection converts an incoming fermion into an outgoing hole and is usually tied to a superconducting interface.
